commands.review_summary:
The PR probes prepared Feishu audio bytes with the existing media runtime ffprobe helper, forwards the millisecond duration to file upload for audio messages, and tests success plus probe-failure fallback.

PR surface: Source +29, Tests +50. Total +79 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main and v2026.5.28 route Feishu audio uploads without duration while the Feishu upload API contract says omitted duration prevents displaying the concrete audio length; I did not run a live before-fix send.

target.title: fix(feishu): show voice message duration via upload duration
target.body:
## Problem

Voice/audio messages sent to Feishu (opus) play fine, but the Feishu UI shows
no duration ("X:XX") on the voice bubble. (#53798)

## Cause

Feishu derives the voice-bubble duration from the `duration` parameter of the
file upload API (`im/v1/files`); per the docs, without it the duration cannot
be displayed ("不传值时无法显示文件的具体时长"). The audio message content
carries only `{file_key}` and has no duration field, so the duration was never
set.

## Fix

`sendMediaFeishu` probes the outgoing audio with `ffprobe` and passes the result
as the upload `duration` (ms). It probes the buffer that is actually sent (after
the existing voice transcode, which caps length via
`MEDIA_FFMPEG_MAX_AUDIO_DURATION_SECS`), so the reported length matches what is
played. Probing is best-effort: on failure it logs a warning and omits the
duration, and the message still sends. The audio message content is unchanged.

## Tests

- sets `duration` on the upload for audio messages
- omits `duration` (and logs a warning) when probing fails

## Real behavior proof

Captured from a live OpenClaw -> Feishu deployment with this fix applied: the
agent sent an Ogg/Opus voice reply into a Feishu topic and the voice bubble now
renders the duration (`6:27`) -- the indicator that was missing before the fix
(#53798). Conversation text is redacted.

![Feishu voice message from OpenClaw showing a 6:27 duration on the voice bubble](https://github.com/areslp/openclaw/releases/download/feishu-voice-proof/feishu-voice-duration-proof.png)

Fixes #53798

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
